calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lian Ji Xu, in pro per, Tel. 415.850.3381, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is denied. Defendant shall remit $100 per pay period for payment on account of this debt. The Court shall prepare the order and mail to parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Andrew P. Altholz, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Attorneys Commercial Service.
Nancy Hirabayashi, the Collection Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Super Star Mart LLC, dba Oceanview Supermarket, or Lian Ji Xu, a/k/a Linda Cheng.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 7, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 7, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Attorneys Commercial Service, and against the Defaulted Defendants Super Star Mart LLC, dba Oceanview Supermarket, and Lian Ji Xu, a/k/a Linda Cheng as follows:

Damages/Principal - $130,705.62.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,980.27.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $439.25, for a total of $138,125.14.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
